{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emriss's staff
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Emriss's staff]] is topped with a [[diamond]] shaped like a blooming flower.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
